example: Whichever you don't choose is called the opportunity cost.
zh: 機會成本，指選擇一項行動而放棄的其他選項的價值。
ja: 機会費用とは、ある選択をすることで失われる他の選択肢の価値のこと。

example: You can't always do everything, so prioritizing what's most important is key.
zh: 優先排序，將重要的事情放在首位。
ja: 優先順位をつけること、重要なことを先に行うこと。

example: Quitting feeds up time spent on a project that might get nowhere.
ja: やめること、諦めること。

example: He chose to discontinue 70% of Apple's product.
ja: 中止する、販売や提供をやめること。

example: You will know whether to keep enduring or quit.
ja: 耐え忍ぶこと、困難に耐えること。

example: Doing something you dislike can cause a lot of stress.
ja: ストレス、精神的な緊張や負担。

example: Quitting those things can relieve you way better.
You want to be determined to fix it because you don't want to see as a loser.
ja: 決心している、断固とした。

example: Stress can result in drug and alcohol misuse.
Quitting these things will give you the opportunity to reflect and find more meaning in life.
I was juggling school exams, competitions, swimming and piano.
ja: 複数のことを同時にこなすこと。

example: It all depends on your perspective and circumstances.
